note: seq=79: deploy Meta-Brain self-improvement ENGINE LIVE -- CORRECTED PATHS (seq-78 failed selftest because it wrote improve.py to /opt/brain; the brain package is actually at /opt/atlas/brain per seq-53; the gate caught it and rolled back before any units were written). This writes improve.py to /opt/atlas/brain/brain/improve.py and points sys.path/WorkingDirectory at /opt/atlas/brain so schemas+store import. Engine sha c472ee5a (verified untruncated; selftest reproduced PASS in sandbox against the real brain package: 12 risky escalated, 4 benign auto-safe, 5 hourly + 9 daily ideas ranked). Hourly+daily timers + a 15-min report publisher (engine writes reports locally only; publisher gh_puts improvement-report-{hourly,daily,latest}.json + improve-publish.json to status/hetzner/). Auto-safe-only staging into a box-local outbox (never pushed/applied); risky -> needs_human + escalated; the HMAC puller's restore-point+health+rollback (Guardian) owns every real apply. Immediate first hourly pass kicked.

steps.note: seq=79: Meta-Brain self-improvement engine LIVE (corrected /opt/atlas/brain paths) + report publisher.

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/brain/brain/improve.py':'c472ee5a48f3d939a53534dc981b219f51fa7583bc8aec7c2cf5403b0f91c7a7'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('engine sha ok')"
/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'/opt/atlas/brain'); from brain.improve import selftest; sys.exit(selftest())"
/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import os; [os.makedirs(p,exist_ok=True) for p in ('/var/lib/brain/improve-outbox/manifests','/var/lib/atlas/status')]; print('dirs ok')"

/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/importers/atlas_improve_publish.py':'74911678e83bb87673633214b589f3351899c9e4c6acdd38d5ffa91d70f3684c'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('publisher sha ok')"

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=Meta Brain improvement engine -- HOURLY pass
After=network-online.target postgresql.service
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=oneshot
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/audit.env
WorkingDirectory=/opt/atlas/brain
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'/opt/atlas/brain'); from brain.improve import _main; sys.exit(_main(['--hourly','--root','/var/lib/brain','--signals','/var/lib/atlas/status','--outbox','/var/lib/brain/improve-outbox','--report-dir','/var/lib/atlas/status']))"
TimeoutStartSec=300
Nice=15
IOSchedulingClass=idle

[Unit]
Description=Meta Brain improvement engine -- HOURLY pass

[Timer]
OnCalendar=hourly
Persistent=true
RandomizedDelaySec=180

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target

[Unit]
Description=Meta Brain improvement engine -- DAILY pass
After=network-online.target postgresql.service
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=oneshot
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/audit.env
WorkingDirectory=/opt/atlas/brain
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'/opt/atlas/brain'); from brain.improve import _main; sys.exit(_main(['--daily','--root','/var/lib/brain','--signals','/var/lib/atlas/status','--outbox','/var/lib/brain/improve-outbox','--report-dir','/var/lib/atlas/status']))"
TimeoutStartSec=600
Nice=15
IOSchedulingClass=idle

[Unit]
Description=Meta Brain improvement engine -- DAILY pass

[Timer]
OnCalendar=*-*-* 04:10:00
Persistent=true
RandomizedDelaySec=300

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS improvement-report publisher (engine reports -> status feed)
After=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=oneshot
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/audit.env
Environment=ATLAS_IMPROVE_REPORTS=/var/lib/atlas/status
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/importers/atlas_improve_publish.py
TimeoutStartSec=140
Nice=15

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS improvement-report publisher timer

[Timer]
OnBootSec=2min
OnUnitActiveSec=15min
Persistent=true

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import os,time,subprocess as s; keys=['STATUS_TOKEN','STATUS_REPO','STATUS_API_BASE','STATUS_BRANCH','NODE_ID']; open('/etc/atlas/audit.env','w').write(chr(10).join('%s=%s'%(k,os.environ[k]) for k in keys if os.environ.get(k))+chr(10)); os.chmod('/etc/atlas/audit.env',0o600); s.run(['systemctl','daemon-reload']); [ (s.run(['systemctl','enable',u]), s.run(['systemctl','start',u])) for u in ['brain-improve-hourly.timer','brain-improve-daily.timer','atlas-improve-publish.timer'] ]; [ s.run(['systemctl','reset-failed',v]) for v in ['brain-improve-hourly.service','atlas-improve-publish.service'] ]; s.run(['systemctl','start','--no-block','brain-improve-hourly.service']); time.sleep(3); s.run(['systemctl','start','--no-block','atlas-improve-publish.service']); print('improve engine + publisher live')"
